description.value: This spell functions like protection from evil, except that the deflection and resistance bonuses apply to attacks made by chaotic creatures. The target receives a new saving throw against control by chaotic creatures and chaotic summoned creatures cannot touch the target. Protection from Chaos, Communal This spell functions like protection from chaos, except you divide the duration in 1-minute intervals among the creatures touched.
